title: Switch
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Switch wrapper composed from the local Base UI Switch primitive, shadcn size styling, root/thumb slots, and local fixture shells for Field and Label example layouts.

examples.title: SwitchDemo
examples.description: Airplane mode switch with a sibling label shell.

examples.title: SwitchDescription
examples.description: Switch with local Field content and description shells.

examples.title: SwitchChoiceCard
examples.description: Choice-card Switch layout using local Field and Label shells.

examples.title: SwitchDisabled
examples.description: Disabled Switch example with Field data-disabled shell.

examples.title: SwitchInvalid
examples.description: Invalid Switch example with aria-invalid and Field data-invalid shell.

examples.title: SwitchSizes
examples.description: Small and default Switch size examples.

examples.title: SwitchRtl
examples.description: RTL Switch layout using local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: Field and Label example layouts use local fixture shells until those registry items land.
deviations.rationale: The Switch component must be installable before shadcn Field and Label. Local shells preserve rendered slot, class, and example layout parity without introducing unavailable registry dependencies.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
